parameters.query: SELECT milestone_name, category, owner, target_date, status, blocker, (target_date - CURRENT_DATE) AS days_until_due FROM tz30_launch_milestones WHERE status != 'completed' ORDER BY target_date ASC;
UPDATE tz30_launch_milestones SET status = 'at_risk', updated_at = NOW() WHERE status = 'pending' AND target_date <= CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '14 days';

parameters.subject: TZ30 Launch Status: {{$json.completed}}/{{$json.total_milestones}} complete, {{$json.at_risk}} at risk

meta.description: Friday 8 AM — reviews TZ30 launch milestones, auto-flags at-risk items, emails weekly status to Fabian.
